rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Vlad Coods Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 5, 2015, line 1. PLAINTIFFS PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC and Vlad Coods Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings DENIED. Demurrer to this cause of action has been previously overruled. Bennett v. Suncloud (1997) 56 Cal.App.4th 91. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAMIEN QUINN VS. SARATOGA FUND I, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 5, 2015, line 2. DEFENDANT SARATOGA FUND I, LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to November 5, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint and reply to department 501 no later than October 16, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court is in receipt of the courtesy copies of moving papers and opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSE CONTRERAS CARDENAS ET AL VS. RACHEL HOWARD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 5, 2015, line 7. DEFENDANT RACHEL HOWARD's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS GRANTED, subject to opposition. Notice of Termination of Tenancy is fatally defective as it does not comply with CC 1946.1(h).= (501/REQ)
